message: Google Vision: Permission denied. Check your service account has Vision API access.

debug.message: 7 PERMISSION_DENIED: This API method requires billing to be enabled. Please enable billing on project #921318342508 by visiting https://console.developers.google.com/billing/enable?project=921318342508 then retry.
